text.title: Multi-Platform Design Parity Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid Multi-Platform Design Parity output. Subagent must satisfy this before returning to the caller.

forbidden.pattern: interaction_matrix missing for any released component
platform-native conventions overridden for cross-platform brand

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim narrative fields to ≤500 chars preserving named entities + numeric claims.
Promote a 'no decision yet' state to status='pending' rather than fabricating a decision.

list.item: platforms populated with a typed value
token_map populated with a typed value
interaction_matrix populated with a typed value
density_tier_rules populated with a typed value
release_cadence populated with a typed value
owner populated with a typed value
No forbidden pattern matches the output
